pageContext.name: Pop Up Parade Megumin
pageContext.description: 'My name is Megumin! The arch-wizard who casts the powerful Explosion spell!'  Pop-Up Parade is a series of figures that are easy to collect with affordable prices and speedy releases! Each figure typically stands around 17-18cm in height and the series features a vast selection of characters from popular anime and game series, with many more to be added soon!  Pop-Up Parade Megumin from the movie 'KONO SUBARASHII SEKAI NI SYUKUFUKU WO! LEGEND OF CRIMSON' is being rereleased! She's been recreated in a cute, confident pose with a smug look on her face and her hat is also removable!  Be sure to add her to your collection today!
